title: Critic Gate Profile
description: Configuration for a named profile that determines verdict thresholds and behavior of the rootnode-critic-gate Skill. Profiles are portable across users and projects. Same shape conventions as rootnode-handoff-trigger-check profiles but with critic-gate-specific parameters.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the profile schema this file conforms to. Current version: 1.0.0.

name.description: Profile identifier in kebab-case. Used in the Skill's output to record which profile was applied.

description.description: Human-readable description of when this profile applies.

auto_approve_on.description: Severity levels that, when present as the highest finding, still result in APPROVE verdict. 'clean_pass_only' means no findings of any kind. 'info' allows info-severity findings to coexist with APPROVE verdict (findings are recorded in audit trail but don't block).

request_changes_threshold.description: Severity levels that route to REQUEST_CHANGES verdict (rather than escalating to REJECT). Author can re-propose after addressing findings. Empty array means no severity routes to REQUEST_CHANGES — every non-passing finding becomes REJECT. Strictest profiles use empty array.

reject_on.description: Severity levels that route to REJECT verdict regardless of other settings. 'blocker' is always REJECT. Strict profiles add 'major', 'minor', or even 'info'. SEVERITY COVERAGE REQUIREMENT: every severity (info, minor, major, blocker) must appear in exactly one of auto_approve_on, request_changes_threshold, or reject_on. No severity should be unrouted; the Skill validates this at runtime and rejects misconfigured profiles.

skip_checks.description: Checks to skip entirely. Should be empty in nearly all cases. Listed here only to support specialized profiles where a check genuinely doesn't apply (e.g., a profile for non-engine-evolution changes might skip detection_narrowness). Skipping invariant_compliance is strongly discouraged — that check is the core safety mechanism.

escalation_required_for_categories.description: Finding categories that always require human escalation regardless of severity. These are the changes the Critic does not have authority to approve under any profile.

auto_resolution_allowed.description: When true, REQUEST_CHANGES verdicts can be auto-resolved if the change author addresses findings within the same turn (no full re-submission cycle). Useful for desk profiles where the human is supervising. Should be false for unattended profiles.

max_diff_size_for_auto_eval.description: Maximum diff size (lines) the Critic will evaluate without recommending the change be split. Larger diffs trigger REQUEST_CHANGES with a 'split for review' recommendation. Smaller numbers force more granular reviews.

notes.description: Optional. Free-text notes about when/how this profile is used.
